name: llm-guard-kit
summary: Real-time reliability monitoring for LLM agents. v0.9.0: cross-domain scoring via P(True) ensemble (AUROC ~0.78, ~$0.0003/call) and structural LogReg (AUROC ~0.73, $0); score_with_ptrue(), fit_structural_verifier() with optional target normalization. v0.8.0: GuardClient SDK, LocalVerifier, QPPGNano, LangChain/LlamaIndex/CrewAI callbacks.
author: Avighan Majumder
